# UI Libraries Project - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This is a Next.js UI component library project featuring reusable components like buttons with UI-style variants.

## Project Structure
- `src/app/` - Next.js app directory with pages and layouts
- `src/components/ui/` - Reusable UI component library
- Components are built with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS

## Available Components
- **Button** - Multiple variants (primary, secondary, outlined, text) and sizes (small, medium, large)

## Progress
- [x] Copilot instructions created
- [x] Project scaffolded with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- [x] UI components structure created
- [x] Button components implemented with UI-style variants
- [x] Dependencies installed
- [x] Documentation updated

## Development Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm start` - Start production server
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint
